description: Black backpack with grey panels and branding on the front An external zipped pocket in the front and two mesh pockets on the sides Two main zippered compartments with two slip pockets and an organise sleeve inside in the first compartment and a padded laptop compartment with velcro closure in the second back compartment Haul loop and a soft padded handle on top for handling ease Padded, adjustable shoulder straps with mesh lining that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Cushioned mesh panel at the back for added comfort and breathability Warranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
